methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $14M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $110M - $1.8B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: Watershed
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $1.8B

private.name: Graphyte
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $200M

private.name: Fourth Power
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $150M

private.name: Steady Energy
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $110M

data.narrative:
Aclarity is a Series A climate and energy company founded by Julie Bliss Mullen, having raised $14M to date. The valuation analysis triangulates against a peer universe of 9 private companies and 1 public comparable (LNZA), with four primary Climate & Energy peers at the same stage: Watershed ($1.8B), Graphyte ($200M), Fourth Power ($150M), and Steady Energy ($110M).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using total capital raised as a proxy for post-money value, applies a 2.0x multiplier typical of Series A to growth-stage progression, implying a $28M valuation. Peer-median analysis across the four same-sector, same-stage comparables yields a median of $175M, with a range spanning $110M to $1.8B. The peer set exhibits significant dispersion, reflecting heterogeneity in business model maturity and market positioning within the frontier climate technology space.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $24M (low) to $201M (high), with a median of $102M. This wide range reflects two primary uncertainties: material variation in stage readiness and unit economics among climate technology peers, and the outsized influence of Watershed's $1.8B outlier valuation on the peer median. Resolution of these uncertainties would require clarity on Aclarity's specific technology maturity, deployment traction, and capital efficiency relative to named comparables.
